ops.title: superset v1.15+ returns worktreePath directly (list and get); the old derived-path trick is dead, and branches get rewritten server-side
ops.body:
Superset CLI v1.15.0 (verified live 2026-07-16) returns the authoritative `worktreePath` on `workspaces list --local --json` entries and on `workspaces get <id> --json` (note: `get` takes no `--local`). The v0.2.23-era claim that the CLI exposes no path is obsolete, and the old derivation `~/.superset/worktrees/<projectId>/<branch>` is dead — superset rewrites branches server-side (`smoke-superset` → `yasyf/smoke-superset`, de-duped `-2`), so any path built from the requested branch is wrong.

cc-orchestrate's driver reads `worktreePath` from `workspaces get` after create (landed 2026-07-16, commit 9e503c6, which also replaced the removed `projects setup --import` with `projects create --local --import --name` and adopted the nested `{workspace:{...},alreadyExists}` create envelope; `supersetWorktreeBase` is deleted). superset remains the only backend with `ManagesWorktree`. See [[workstream-sprint-hierarchy]], [[cc-orchestrate-dev-gotchas]].
